---
title: "RIP-seq DESeq2: FLAG-eIF3d enrichment over IgG"
author: "Kate"
date: "2026-05"
output: html_document
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(DESeq2)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggvenn)
library(ggokabeito)
library(cowplot)
library(pheatmap)
library(matrixStats)
```

# Load inputs from 00

```{r load_data}
allCounts <- readRDS(here("ripseq", "output", "ripseq_allCounts_raw.rds"))
metadata  <- read_csv(here("ripseq", "output", "ripseq_metadata_clean.csv"),
                      show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(
    condition = factor(condition, levels = c("normoxia", "hypoxia")),
    ip_type   = factor(ip_type,   levels = c("igg_mock", "flag_eif3d", "eif4e")),
    hours     = factor(hours)
  )

cat("allCounts:", nrow(allCounts), "genes x", ncol(allCounts), "samples\n")

OUTLIER_ID  <- "0077"
OUTLIER_ID2 <- "0065"
cat("metadata:", nrow(metadata), "rows\n")
cat("condition levels:", levels(metadata$condition), "\n")
cat("ip_type levels:", levels(metadata$ip_type), "\n")
cat("hours levels:", levels(metadata$hours), "\n")
```

```{r gene_anno}
gene_anno <- read_tsv(here("accessories", "human", "gene_anno_hs_dm_v49_r111.tsv.gz"),
                      col_names = c("gene_id", "symbol", "biotype", "species", "version"),
                      show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  filter(species == "human") |>
  dplyr::select(gene_id, symbol) |>
  distinct(gene_id, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  mutate(gene_id_clean = sub("\\..*", "", gene_id))
```

# Per-timepoint DESeq2: FLAG-eIF3d vs IgG-mock

```{r run_deseq}
LFC_CUTOFF  <- 0.5
PADJ_CUTOFF <- 0.05

timepoints <- list(
  normoxia_1hr = list(condition = "normoxia", hours = "1"),
  hypoxia_1hr  = list(condition = "hypoxia",  hours = "1"),
  hypoxia_4hr  = list(condition = "hypoxia",  hours = "4"),
  hypoxia_24hr = list(condition = "hypoxia",  hours = "24")
)

run_deseq_lfc <- function(counts_mat, meta_df, ip_target = "flag_eif3d") {
  results <- list()
  for (tp_name in names(timepoints)) {
    tp       <- timepoints[[tp_name]]
    meta_sub <- meta_df |>
      filter(condition == tp$condition, hours == tp$hours,
             ip_type %in% c(ip_target, "igg_mock"))
    meta_sub$ip_type <- relevel(droplevels(factor(meta_sub$ip_type)), ref = "igg_mock")
    # allCounts columns are compound names (e.g. "normoxia_flag_eif3d_1_a_NM2026_0045")
    cts_sub  <- counts_mat[, grep(paste(meta_sub$id, collapse = "|"), colnames(counts_mat))]
    dds      <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(cts_sub, meta_sub, design = ~ ip_type)
    dds      <- DESeq(dds, quiet = TRUE)
    coef     <- resultsNames(dds)[grep(ip_target, resultsNames(dds))]
    res      <- as.data.frame(lfcShrink(dds, coef = coef, type = "apeglm"))
    results[[tp_name]] <- res |>
      rownames_to_column("gene_id") |>
      left_join(gene_anno, by = "gene_id") |>
      mutate(timepoint = tp_name) |>
      arrange(padj)
  }
  results
}

deseq_results_full    <- run_deseq_lfc(allCounts, metadata)
deseq_results_no_out  <- run_deseq_lfc(
  allCounts[, !grepl(OUTLIER_ID, colnames(allCounts))],
  metadata |> dplyr::filter(!grepl(OUTLIER_ID, id))
)
deseq_results_no_out2 <- run_deseq_lfc(
  allCounts[, !grepl(OUTLIER_ID2, colnames(allCounts))],
  metadata |> dplyr::filter(!grepl(OUTLIER_ID2, id))
)
```

# log2FC distributions: with vs without outlier

```{r density_comparison}
tp_levels <- c("normoxia_1hr", "hypoxia_1hr", "hypoxia_4hr", "hypoxia_24hr")

lfc_compare <- bind_rows(
  bind_rows(deseq_results_no_out)  |> mutate(status = paste0("without ", OUTLIER_ID)),
  bind_rows(deseq_results_no_out2) |> mutate(status = paste0("without ", OUTLIER_ID2))
) |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange)) |>
  mutate(
    timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = tp_levels),
    status    = factor(status, levels = c(paste0("without ", OUTLIER_ID),
                                          paste0("without ", OUTLIER_ID2)))
  )

# normoxia_1hr only: without 0077 vs without 0065 (2 panels)
p_compare <- lfc_compare |>
  dplyr::filter(timepoint == "normoxia_1hr") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = log2FoldChange)) +
  geom_density(linewidth = 0.8, color = "#E69F00", fill = "#E69F00", alpha = 0.15) +
  facet_wrap(~ status, nrow = 1) +
  xlim(-1, 1) +
  labs(x = "log2FC (eIF3d IP / IgG)", y = "Density",
       title = paste0("normoxia 1hr: without ", OUTLIER_ID, " vs without ", OUTLIER_ID2)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

p_compare
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_density_outlier_comparison.pdf"),
       p_compare, width = 6, height = 3)

# 4-panel: without outlier only
p_without <- bind_rows(deseq_results_no_out) |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange)) |>
  mutate(timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = tp_levels)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = log2FoldChange)) +
  geom_density(linewidth = 0.8, color = "#E69F00", fill = "#E69F00", alpha = 0.15) +
  facet_wrap(~ timepoint, nrow = 1) +
  xlim(-1, 1) +
  labs(x = "log2FC (eIF3d IP / IgG)", y = "Density",
       title = paste0("log2FC density: without outlier (", OUTLIER_ID, ")")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

p_without
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_density_no_outlier.pdf"),
       p_without, width = 12, height = 3)
```

```{r select_results}
# Change to deseq_results_full to include the outlier
deseq_results <- deseq_results_no_out
```

```{r save_results}
for (tp_name in names(deseq_results)) {
  write_csv(
    deseq_results[[tp_name]],
    here("ripseq", "output",
         paste0("ripseq_deseq_", tp_name, "_flag_eif3d_vs_igg.csv"))
  )
}
for (tp_name in names(deseq_results_full)) {
  write_csv(
    deseq_results_full[[tp_name]],
    here("ripseq", "output",
         paste0("ripseq_deseq_", tp_name, "_flag_eif3d_vs_igg_with_outlier.csv"))
  )
}
for (tp_name in names(deseq_results_no_out2)) {
  write_csv(
    deseq_results_no_out2[[tp_name]],
    here("ripseq", "output",
         paste0("ripseq_deseq_", tp_name, "_flag_eif3d_vs_igg_no_out2.csv"))
  )
}
saveRDS(deseq_results, here("ripseq", "output", "ripseq_deseq_results_list.rds"))
cat("Saved DESeq2 results for", length(deseq_results), "timepoints\n")
```

```{r density_eif3d_v2, fig.width=12, fig.height=3}
enriched_counts_3d <- bind_rows(deseq_results) |>
  filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange), !is.na(padj)) |>
  mutate(timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = tp_levels)) |>
  group_by(timepoint) |>
  summarise(n_enriched = sum(log2FoldChange > LFC_CUTOFF & padj < PADJ_CUTOFF),
            .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(label = paste0("LFC>1, padj<0.05, n = ", n_enriched))

p_density_3d_v2 <- bind_rows(deseq_results) |>
  filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange)) |>
  mutate(timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = tp_levels)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = log2FoldChange)) +
  geom_density(linewidth = 0.8, color = "#E69F00", fill = "#E69F00", alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_text(data = enriched_counts_3d, aes(label = label),
            x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.4,
            inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ timepoint, nrow = 1) +
  labs(x = "log2FC (eIF3d IP / IgG)", y = "Density") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  xlim(-2, 10)

p_density_3d_v2
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_density_eif3d_v2.pdf"), p_density_3d_v2,
       width = 12, height = 3)
```

# Per-timepoint DESeq2: eIF4E vs IgG-mock

```{r run_deseq_4e}
cts_no_out   <- allCounts[, !grepl(OUTLIER_ID,  colnames(allCounts))]
meta_no_out  <- metadata |> dplyr::filter(!grepl(OUTLIER_ID,  id))
cts_no_out2  <- allCounts[, !grepl(OUTLIER_ID2, colnames(allCounts))]
meta_no_out2 <- metadata |> dplyr::filter(!grepl(OUTLIER_ID2, id))

deseq_results_4e_full  <- run_deseq_lfc(allCounts,   metadata,     ip_target = "eif4e")
deseq_results_4e       <- run_deseq_lfc(cts_no_out,  meta_no_out,  ip_target = "eif4e")
deseq_results_4e_no_out2 <- run_deseq_lfc(cts_no_out2, meta_no_out2, ip_target = "eif4e")
```

```{r density_4e}
p_density_4e <- bind_rows(deseq_results_4e) |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange)) |>
  mutate(timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = tp_levels)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = log2FoldChange)) +
  geom_density(linewidth = 0.8, color = "#56B4E9", fill = "#56B4E9", alpha = 0.15) +
  facet_wrap(~ timepoint, nrow = 1) +
  xlim(-1, 1) +
  labs(x = "log2FC (eIF4E IP / IgG)", y = "Density",
       title = "log2FC density: eIF4E vs IgG") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

p_density_4e
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_density_4e.pdf"), p_density_4e, width = 12, height = 3)
```

```{r density_comparison_4e}
lfc_compare_4e <- bind_rows(
  bind_rows(deseq_results_4e)          |> mutate(status = paste0("without ", OUTLIER_ID)),
  bind_rows(deseq_results_4e_no_out2)  |> mutate(status = paste0("without ", OUTLIER_ID2))
) |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange), timepoint == "normoxia_1hr") |>
  mutate(status = factor(status, levels = c(paste0("without ", OUTLIER_ID),
                                            paste0("without ", OUTLIER_ID2))))

p_compare_4e <- ggplot(lfc_compare_4e, aes(x = log2FoldChange)) +
  geom_density(linewidth = 0.8, color = "#56B4E9", fill = "#56B4E9", alpha = 0.15) +
  facet_wrap(~ status, nrow = 1) +
  labs(x = "log2FC (eIF4E IP / IgG)", y = "Density",
       title = paste0("normoxia 1hr eIF4E: without ", OUTLIER_ID, " vs without ", OUTLIER_ID2)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

p_compare_4e
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_density_outlier_comparison_4e.pdf"),
       p_compare_4e, width = 6, height = 3)
```

```{r save_results_4e}
for (tp_name in names(deseq_results_4e)) {
  write_csv(
    deseq_results_4e[[tp_name]],
    here("ripseq", "output",
         paste0("ripseq_deseq_", tp_name, "_eif4e_vs_igg.csv"))
  )
}
saveRDS(deseq_results_4e, here("ripseq", "output", "ripseq_deseq_4e_results_list.rds"))
cat("Saved eIF4E DESeq2 results for", length(deseq_results_4e), "timepoints\n")
```

# Post-normalization QC

```{r norm_counts}
meta_qc <- metadata |> dplyr::filter(!grepl(OUTLIER_ID, id))
cts_qc  <- allCounts[, grep(paste(meta_qc$id, collapse = "|"), colnames(allCounts))]

dds_qc  <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(cts_qc, meta_qc, design = ~ ip_type)
dds_qc  <- estimateSizeFactors(dds_qc)
qcinput <- log2(counts(dds_qc, normalized = TRUE) + 1)
qcinput <- qcinput[matrixStats::rowSds(qcinput) > 1, ]
cat("QC matrix after SD filter:", nrow(qcinput), "genes x", ncol(qcinput), "samples\n")
```

```{r qc_heatmap}
col_ids <- sub(".*_(NM\\d+_\\d+)$", "\\1", colnames(qcinput))
sample_anno <- data.frame(
  ip_type   = as.character(meta_qc$ip_type[match(col_ids, meta_qc$id)]),
  condition = as.character(meta_qc$condition[match(col_ids, meta_qc$id)]),
  hours     = as.character(meta_qc$hours[match(col_ids, meta_qc$id)]),
  row.names = colnames(qcinput)
)

mycor <- cor(qcinput, method = "pearson")
p_heatmap <- pheatmap::pheatmap(
  mat            = mycor,
  annotation_col = sample_anno,
  border_color   = "black",
  scale          = "none",
  cluster_rows   = TRUE,
  cluster_cols   = TRUE,
  fontsize       = 7
)
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_postnorm_heatmap.pdf"), p_heatmap, width = 14, height = 13)
```

```{r qc_pca}
pca_res  <- prcomp(t(qcinput), scale. = TRUE)
pca_data <- as.data.frame(pca_res$x) |>
  rownames_to_column("sample") |>
  mutate(id = sub(".*_(NM\\d+_\\d+)$", "\\1", sample)) |>
  left_join(dplyr::select(meta_qc, id, condition, ip_type, hours, rep), by = "id")

pc1_var <- round(summary(pca_res)$importance[2, 1] * 100, 1)
pc2_var <- round(summary(pca_res)$importance[2, 2] * 100, 1)

p_pca_ip <- ggplot(pca_data, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = ip_type, shape = condition)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() +
  labs(x = paste0("PC1 (", pc1_var, "%)"), y = paste0("PC2 (", pc2_var, "%)"),
       color = "IP type", shape = "Condition",
       title = "PCA post-normalization: IP type") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

p_pca_time <- ggplot(pca_data, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = hours, shape = ip_type)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() +
  labs(x = paste0("PC1 (", pc1_var, "%)"), y = paste0("PC2 (", pc2_var, "%)"),
       color = "Timepoint (hr)", shape = "IP type",
       title = "PCA post-normalization: timepoint") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

p_pca_rep <- ggplot(pca_data, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = rep, shape = ip_type)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() +
  labs(x = paste0("PC1 (", pc1_var, "%)"), y = paste0("PC2 (", pc2_var, "%)"),
       color = "Replicate", shape = "IP type",
       title = "PCA post-normalization: replicate") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

p_pca_ip
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_postnorm_pca_iptype.pdf"), p_pca_ip, width = 7, height = 5)

p_pca_time
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_postnorm_pca_timepoint.pdf"), p_pca_time, width = 7, height = 5)

p_pca_rep
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_postnorm_pca_replicate.pdf"), p_pca_rep, width = 7, height = 5)
```
## Remove PCA outlier and replot

```{r qc_pca2}
OUTLIER2_IP   <- "igg_mock"   # ip_type: flag_eif3d | eif4e | igg_mock
OUTLIER2_COND <- "hypoxia"      # condition: normoxia | hypoxia
OUTLIER2_HOUR <- "1"            # hours: 1 | 4 | 24
OUTLIER2_REP  <- "c"            # rep: a | b | c

pca_outlier_id <- meta_qc |>
  dplyr::filter(ip_type == OUTLIER2_IP, condition == OUTLIER2_COND,
                hours == OUTLIER2_HOUR, rep == OUTLIER2_REP) |>
  pull(id)

stopifnot("PCA outlier not found -- check OUTLIER2_* params" = length(pca_outlier_id) == 1)
cat("PCA outlier set to:", pca_outlier_id, "\n")
cat(with(meta_qc[meta_qc$id == pca_outlier_id, ],
         paste0("  ip_type=", ip_type, " | condition=", condition,
                " | hours=", hours, " | rep=", rep)), "\n")

meta_qc2 <- meta_qc |> dplyr::filter(id != pca_outlier_id)
cts_qc2  <- allCounts[, grep(paste(meta_qc2$id, collapse = "|"), colnames(allCounts))]

dds_qc2  <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(cts_qc2, meta_qc2, design = ~ ip_type)
dds_qc2  <- estimateSizeFactors(dds_qc2)
qcinput2 <- log2(counts(dds_qc2, normalized = TRUE) + 1)
qcinput2 <- qcinput2[matrixStats::rowSds(qcinput2) > 1, ]

pca_res2  <- prcomp(t(qcinput2), scale. = TRUE)
pca_data2 <- as.data.frame(pca_res2$x) |>
  rownames_to_column("sample") |>
  mutate(id = sub(".*_(NM\\d+_\\d+)$", "\\1", sample)) |>
  left_join(dplyr::select(meta_qc2, id, condition, ip_type, hours, rep), by = "id")

pc1_var2 <- round(summary(pca_res2)$importance[2, 1] * 100, 1)
pc2_var2 <- round(summary(pca_res2)$importance[2, 2] * 100, 1)

p_pca2_ip <- ggplot(pca_data2, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = ip_type, shape = condition)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() +
  labs(x = paste0("PC1 (", pc1_var2, "%)"), y = paste0("PC2 (", pc2_var2, "%)"),
       color = "IP type", shape = "Condition",
       title = "PCA post-normalization (outlier removed): IP type") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

p_pca2_time <- ggplot(pca_data2, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = hours, shape = ip_type)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() +
  labs(x = paste0("PC1 (", pc1_var2, "%)"), y = paste0("PC2 (", pc2_var2, "%)"),
       color = "Timepoint (hr)", shape = "IP type",
       title = "PCA post-normalization (outlier removed): timepoint") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

p_pca2_rep <- ggplot(pca_data2, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = rep, shape = ip_type)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() +
  labs(x = paste0("PC1 (", pc1_var2, "%)"), y = paste0("PC2 (", pc2_var2, "%)"),
       color = "Replicate", shape = "IP type",
       title = "PCA post-normalization (outlier removed): replicate") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

p_pca2_ip
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_postnorm2_pca_iptype.pdf"), p_pca2_ip, width = 7, height = 5)

p_pca2_time
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_postnorm2_pca_timepoint.pdf"), p_pca2_time, width = 7, height = 5)

p_pca2_rep
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_postnorm2_pca_replicate.pdf"), p_pca2_rep, width = 7, height = 5)
```

```{r qc_pca_3d_4e}
meta_3d4e <- meta_qc2 |> dplyr::filter(ip_type %in% c("flag_eif3d", "eif4e"))
cts_3d4e  <- allCounts[, grep(paste(meta_3d4e$id, collapse = "|"), colnames(allCounts))]

dds_3d4e  <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(cts_3d4e, meta_3d4e, design = ~ ip_type)
dds_3d4e  <- estimateSizeFactors(dds_3d4e)
qc_3d4e   <- log2(counts(dds_3d4e, normalized = TRUE) + 1)
qc_3d4e   <- qc_3d4e[matrixStats::rowSds(qc_3d4e) > 1, ]

pca_3d4e  <- prcomp(t(qc_3d4e), scale. = TRUE)
pca_df    <- as.data.frame(pca_3d4e$x) |>
  rownames_to_column("sample") |>
  mutate(id = sub(".*_(NM\\d+_\\d+)$", "\\1", sample)) |>
  left_join(dplyr::select(meta_3d4e, id, condition, ip_type, hours, rep), by = "id")

pc1 <- round(summary(pca_3d4e)$importance[2, 1] * 100, 1)
pc2 <- round(summary(pca_3d4e)$importance[2, 2] * 100, 1)

p_3d4e_ip <- ggplot(pca_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = ip_type, shape = condition)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() +
  labs(x = paste0("PC1 (", pc1, "%)"), y = paste0("PC2 (", pc2, "%)"),
       color = "IP type", shape = "Condition",
       title = "PCA: flag_eif3d + eif4e only") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

p_3d4e_time <- ggplot(pca_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = hours, shape = ip_type)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() +
  labs(x = paste0("PC1 (", pc1, "%)"), y = paste0("PC2 (", pc2, "%)"),
       color = "Timepoint (hr)", shape = "IP type",
       title = "PCA: flag_eif3d + eif4e only") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

p_3d4e_ip
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_pca_3d4e_iptype.pdf"), p_3d4e_ip, width = 7, height = 5)

p_3d4e_time
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_pca_3d4e_timepoint.pdf"), p_3d4e_time, width = 7, height = 5)
```

# Final DESeq2: remove both outliers

```{r deseq_final}
meta_final <- metadata |>
  dplyr::filter(!grepl(OUTLIER_ID, id), id != pca_outlier_id)
cts_final  <- allCounts[, grep(paste(meta_final$id, collapse = "|"), colnames(allCounts))]

cat("Final dataset excludes:", OUTLIER_ID, "(sample QC) and", pca_outlier_id, "(PCA outlier)\n")
cat("Samples retained:", nrow(meta_final), "\n")

deseq_results    <- run_deseq_lfc(cts_final, meta_final, ip_target = "flag_eif3d")
deseq_results_4e <- run_deseq_lfc(cts_final, meta_final, ip_target = "eif4e")
```

```{r density_final_3d, fig.width=12, fig.height=3}
enriched_counts_final <- bind_rows(deseq_results) |>
  filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange), !is.na(padj)) |>
  mutate(timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = tp_levels)) |>
  group_by(timepoint) |>
  summarise(n_enriched = sum(log2FoldChange > LFC_CUTOFF & padj < PADJ_CUTOFF), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(label = paste0("LFC>0.5, padj<0.05, n = ", n_enriched))

p_density_3d_final <- bind_rows(deseq_results) |>
  filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange)) |>
  mutate(timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = tp_levels)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = log2FoldChange)) +
  geom_density(linewidth = 0.8, color = "#E69F00", fill = "#E69F00", alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_text(data = enriched_counts_final, aes(label = label),
            x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.4,
            inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ timepoint, nrow = 1) +
  labs(x = "log2FC (eIF3d IP / IgG)", y = "Density") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  xlim(-2, 10)

p_density_3d_final
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_density_eif3d_final.pdf"), p_density_3d_final,
       width = 12, height = 3)
```

```{r density_final_4e, fig.width=12, fig.height=3}
p_density_4e_final <- bind_rows(deseq_results_4e) |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange)) |>
  mutate(timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = tp_levels)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = log2FoldChange)) +
  geom_density(linewidth = 0.8, color = "#56B4E9", fill = "#56B4E9", alpha = 0.15) +
  facet_wrap(~ timepoint, nrow = 1) +
  labs(x = "log2FC (eIF4E IP / IgG)", y = "Density") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

p_density_4e_final
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_density_4e_final.pdf"), p_density_4e_final,
       width = 12, height = 3)
```

```{r save_results_final}
for (tp_name in names(deseq_results)) {
  write_csv(deseq_results[[tp_name]],
            here("ripseq", "output",
                 paste0("ripseq_deseq_", tp_name, "_flag_eif3d_vs_igg.csv")))
}
saveRDS(deseq_results, here("ripseq", "output", "ripseq_deseq_results_list.rds"))

for (tp_name in names(deseq_results_4e)) {
  write_csv(deseq_results_4e[[tp_name]],
            here("ripseq", "output",
                 paste0("ripseq_deseq_", tp_name, "_eif4e_vs_igg.csv")))
}
saveRDS(deseq_results_4e, here("ripseq", "output", "ripseq_deseq_4e_results_list.rds"))
cat("Final results saved:", length(deseq_results), "timepoints (3d),",
    length(deseq_results_4e), "timepoints (4e)\n")
```

# Enriched gene counts

```{r enriched_counts}
enriched_per_tp <- lapply(deseq_results, function(res) {
  res |> filter(padj < PADJ_CUTOFF, log2FoldChange > LFC_CUTOFF) |> pull(gene_id)
})

cat("Enriched genes (padj <", PADJ_CUTOFF, ", log2FC >", LFC_CUTOFF, "):\n")
for (tp in names(enriched_per_tp)) {
  cat(" ", tp, ":", length(enriched_per_tp[[tp]]), "\n")
}
```

# Volcano plots

```{r volcano_plots, fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
make_volcano <- function(res_df, tp_name) {
  plot_df <- res_df |>
    filter(!is.na(padj)) |>
    mutate(
      sig = case_when(
        padj < PADJ_CUTOFF & log2FoldChange >  LFC_CUTOFF ~ "enriched",
        padj < PADJ_CUTOFF & log2FoldChange < -LFC_CUTOFF ~ "depleted",
        TRUE ~ "ns"
      )
    )

  top_labels <- plot_df |>
    filter(sig == "enriched") |>
    slice_min(padj, n = 15)

  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj), color = sig)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 0.8) +
    geom_text_repel(data = top_labels, aes(label = symbol),
                    size = 2.5, max.overlaps = 20, color = "black") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(enriched = "#E69F00", depleted = "steelblue", ns = "grey70")) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-LFC_CUTOFF, LFC_CUTOFF), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(PADJ_CUTOFF), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.4,
             label = paste0("enriched: ", sum(plot_df$sig == "enriched")), size = 3) +
    labs(title = tp_name,
         x = "log2FC (eIF3d IP / IgG)",
         y = "-log10(padj)",
         color = NULL) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
}

volcano_plots <- lapply(names(deseq_results), function(tp) {
  make_volcano(deseq_results[[tp]], tp)
})

plot_grid(plotlist = volcano_plots, ncol = 2, labels = "AUTO")
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_volcano_flag_eif3d.pdf"), width = 12, height = 10)
```

# Overlap with eIF3d translatome

```{r load_te_genes}
te_genes <- read_csv(here("output", "genesets", "hypoxia_3d_promotes_TE_1hr_lfc0.5.csv"),
                     show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  pull(ensembl_gene)

cat("eIF3d promotes TE genes (hypoxia 1hr):", length(te_genes), "\n")
```

```{r venn_rip_te}
# use version-stripped IDs for comparison
enriched_hypoxia_1hr_clean <- sub("\\..*", "", enriched_per_tp$hypoxia_1hr)

venn_list <- list(
  "RIP enriched\n(hypoxia 1hr)"    = enriched_hypoxia_1hr_clean,
  "eIF3d promotes TE\n(hypoxia 1hr)" = te_genes
)

overlap_ids <- intersect(enriched_hypoxia_1hr_clean, te_genes)

overlap_df <- deseq_results$hypoxia_1hr |>
  mutate(gene_id_clean = sub("\\..*", "", gene_id)) |>
  filter(gene_id_clean %in% overlap_ids) |>
  dplyr::select(gene_id, symbol, log2FoldChange, padj) |>
  arrange(symbol)

cat("RIP enriched:", length(enriched_hypoxia_1hr_clean), "\n")
cat("TE regulon:", length(te_genes), "\n")
cat("Overlap:", nrow(overlap_df), "\n\n")
cat("Overlap genes (alphabetical):\n")
cat(sort(overlap_df$symbol), sep = "\n")

write_csv(overlap_df, here("ripseq", "output", "ripseq_rip_te_overlap_hypoxia_1hr.csv"))

p_venn <- ggvenn(venn_list,
                 fill_color  = c("#E69F00", "grey50"),
                 stroke_size = 0.5,
                 text_size   = 3.5) +
  theme_void()

p_venn
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_venn_rip_vs_te.pdf"), p_venn, width = 5, height = 5)
```

```{r fisher_test}
all_genes <- nrow(allCounts)
n_rip     <- length(enriched_hypoxia_1hr_clean)
n_te      <- length(te_genes)
n_overlap <- length(intersect(enriched_hypoxia_1hr_clean, te_genes))

mat <- matrix(
  c(n_overlap,          n_rip - n_overlap,
    n_te - n_overlap,   all_genes - n_rip - n_te + n_overlap),
  nrow = 2,
  dimnames = list(c("RIP enriched", "not RIP enriched"),
                  c("TE regulated", "not TE regulated"))
)
print(mat)
fisher.test(mat, alternative = "greater")
```

# CDF: TE changes colored by RIP binding

```{r cdf_te_rip}
te_files <- list(
  normoxia_1hr = "translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_normoxia_1and4hr.csv",
  hypoxia_1hr  = "translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_hypoxia_1hr.csv",
  hypoxia_4hr  = "translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_hypoxia_4hr.csv",
  hypoxia_24hr = "translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_hypoxia_24hr.csv"
)

# Direction: te_lfc = log2(sictrl / si3d). Positive = eIF3d promotes translation.
# RIP-bound genes shifted right = eIF3d binds and promotes those mRNAs.
# te_lfc > 0.5 & te_padj < 0.05 = eIF3d-promoted genes at this timepoint.

cdf_plots <- lapply(names(te_files), function(tp_name) {
  rip_bound_clean <- sub("\\..*", "", enriched_per_tp[[tp_name]])

  te_data <- read_csv(here("output", te_files[[tp_name]]), show_col_types = FALSE) |>
    mutate(
      gene_id_clean = sub("\\..*", "", gene_id),
      rip_bound     = gene_id_clean %in% rip_bound_clean
    ) |>
    filter(!is.na(te_lfc))

  n_promoted <- sum(te_data$te_lfc > 0.5 & te_data$te_padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
  cat(tp_name, "| total:", nrow(te_data),
      "| RIP-bound:", sum(te_data$rip_bound),
      "| eIF3d-promoted (te_lfc>0.5, padj<0.05):", n_promoted, "\n")

  wt    <- wilcox.test(te_lfc ~ rip_bound, data = te_data)
  label <- paste0("Wilcoxon p = ", signif(wt$p.value, 2),
                  "\nn bound = ", sum(te_data$rip_bound))

  ggplot(te_data, aes(x = te_lfc, color = rip_bound, group = rip_bound)) +
    stat_ecdf(linewidth = 0.8) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c("TRUE" = "#E69F00", "FALSE" = "grey50"),
      labels = c("TRUE" = "RIP-bound", "FALSE" = "Not bound")
    ) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.4,
             label = label, size = 3) +
    labs(title = tp_name,
         x = "TE log2FC (si3d / sictrl)",
         y = "Cumulative fraction",
         color = NULL) +
    xlim(-1, 1) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(legend.position = c(0.25, 0.85))
})

plot_grid(plotlist = cdf_plots, ncol = 2, labels = "AUTO")
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "ripseq_cdf_te_rip_bound.pdf"), width = 10, height = 8)
```



```{r}

```
